ddls:
CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the query (e.g., Apply, Argument, AssertSameNode) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the query */,
  "query_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of query (e.g., Apply, Argument) */,
  "considerations" TEXT /* Considerations for the query (e.g., performance bottlenecks) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the query */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the query was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last person who modified the query */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the query was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the query (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_query_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_type_id") REFERENCES query_types ("query_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_types" (
  "query_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query type */,
  "query_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the query type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the query type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the query type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the query type was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last person who modified the query type */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the query type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_execution_history" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution event */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query being executed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the execution */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the execution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the execution (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "executed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who executed the query */,
  "execution_duration" REAL /* Duration of the query execution in seconds */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Average memory usage during the query execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_execution_history_executed_by FOREIGN KEY ("executed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_execution_history_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query plan */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query the plan belongs to */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the query plan */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the query plan */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the query plan */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the query plan was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last person who modified the query plan */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the query plan was last modified */,
  "plan_status" TEXT /* Current status of the query plan (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_plans_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_plans_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_plans_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., database administrator, developer, analyst) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the query */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the query was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, execute) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_access_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query the recommendation belongs to */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Description of the recommendation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the recommendation */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last person who modified the recommendation */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the recommendation (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_recommendations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_recommendations_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_recommendations_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the query */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last person who modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last modified */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Current status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_versions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_versions_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query that depends on another query */,
  "dependent_query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query that is depended on */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the dependency */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the dependency was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_dependencies_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_dependencies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_dependencies_dependent_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_execution_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution statistics entry */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query the statistics belong to */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Average execution time of the query */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* Average CPU usage of the query */,
  "disk_io" REAL /* Average disk I/O usage during the query execution */,
  "network_usage" REAL /* Average network usage during the query execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_execution_stats_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query the label belongs to */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the label */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the label was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last person who modified the label */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the label was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_labels_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_labels_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_labels_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
